why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official table assigns minecraft:container_set_data to packet id 0x13, and the official ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket numeric fixture encodes framed bytes 13070002012c with body 070002012c for containerId 7, id 2, and value 300. Stevenarella must dispatch that official id/body without panicking and consume the full body.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panicked because steven_protocol::protocol::versions::v26_1_2.rs has no Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping for official packet id 0x13. The current table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:container_set_content / 0x12, but not minecraft:container_set_data / 0x13.

play_clientbound_container_set_data.official_fixture: official ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket(int, int, int) constructor fixture with containerId 7, id 2, and value 300; no initialized Menu, screen, Level, inventory, or game state
play_clientbound_container_set_data.official_body_shape: containerId encoded by FriendlyByteBuf.writeContainerId/readContainerId, id encoded by FriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort, and value encoded by FriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket(int, int, int), ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket.STREAM_CODEC, private FriendlyByteBuf constructor/write methods, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleContainerSetData(ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound container_set_data dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x12 container_set_content, but not official packet id 0x13 container_set_data.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x13 in Clientbound Play; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Play clientbound container_set_data packet id 19
